channel.title: Api on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Api on jamesm.blog

item.title: Grok's New Voice APIs: Speech Recognition and Synthesis at Enterprise Scale
item.description: xAI launches standalone Speech-to-Text and Text-to-Speech APIs, bringing production-grade voice capabilities to developers at competitive pricing.

item.title: AI Cloud Subscriptions: Comparing Pricing and Features in 2026
item.description: A 2026 buyer's guide to AI cloud subscriptions. Compare API pricing, context windows, rate limits, and consumer plans across Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, xAI, Mistral, and DeepSeek.

item.title: DevOps Explainers
item.description: Educational explainer videos and articles covering DevOps concepts including APIs, databases, DNS, Git, and Linux fundamentals.
